channel.title: elizaOS Daily Intelligence
channel.description: Daily facts and insights from the elizaOS ecosystem

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-22
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project is managing a federal class-action lawsuit while simultaneously preparing for the V3 release and expanding the LifeOps ecosystem. Technical efforts are currently focused on resolving CI/CD pipeline failures in the plugin registry and unifying cloud authentication workflows.

GitHub Activity:

  • @elisym/plugin-elizaos-elisym integration (open)
  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • Plugin Proposal: AgentID — Cryptographic Identity & Trust Layer (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on legal matters regarding a new lawsuit and community defense. Moderators are actively banning scammers impersonating staff for 'airdrop' claims....
  • #coders: Technical troubleshooting of OIDC token fetch failures in GitHub Actions and discussion of naming conventions for the new Elisym plugin....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-21
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS ecosystem is transitioning towards autonomous revenue-generating agents with the announcement of v3, while managing security risks following a series of community phishing attacks and token migration closures.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • feat(core): shared batch-queue drains and bounded knowledge embeddings (merged)
  • Delegation chains for autonomous agents (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on token migration closure, ElizaOS v3 revenue features, and clarification of the ElizaOK/ElizaCloud ecosystem relationship....
  • #coders: Announcement and naming convention adjustment for the Elisym plugin, allowing agents to be paid in SOL via Nostr....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-20
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS has formally dissolved the 'Eliza Labs' organizational structure to return to an open-contribution model focused on the core framework. Development currently prioritizes agent memory orchestration and the expansion of the plugin ecosystem, including new native prediction market integrations.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • feat(core): shared batch-queue drains and bounded knowledge embeddings (merged)
  • feat(virus): add autonomous rust agent (concept art) (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on token utilities (staking) and explaining the historical context of the ai16z migration. Heavy moderation activity due to phishing attempts....
  • #coders: A full-stack developer with MEV and NFT experience is seeking project collaborations within the ecosystem. Minimal other technical discussion recorded....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-19
item.description:
Summary: The ElizaOS project is managing critical security vulnerability disclosures while undergoing a major organizational restructuring toward an open contribution model. Development focus has pivoted to the core framework and Milady app, supplemented by extensive dependency maintenance and new commerce plugin proposals.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • Merxex integration for agent-to-agent commerce (open)
  • shared batch-queue drains and bounded knowledge embeddings (merged)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: High volume of scam reports involving phishing links and fake airdrops; technical focus shifted to private security vulnerability reporting by researcher kullai....
  • #coders: Minimal technical activity; discussions primarily focused on identifying Discord mention notifications as scams....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-18
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a major organizational pivot by dissolving Eliza Labs and refocusing on a community-driven core framework model. Technical development remains high with the introduction of a new batch-processing system and preparations for the v3 beta release.

GitHub Activity:

  • V2.0.0 release (open)
  • feat(core): shared batch-queue drains and bounded knowledge embeddings (merged)
  • Plugin Proposal: AgentID — Cryptographic Identity & Trust Layer (closed)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Heavy focus on the dissolution of Eliza Labs and the shift back to an open-source contribution model. Community confusion regarding the relationship between ElizaOS and ai16z was addressed....
  • #coders: Technical sharing included Orbis API for persistent agent memory and the TrustGate middleware for ERC-8004 trust scoring....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-17
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is pivoting toward a secure economic layer for AI agents, prioritizing cryptographic identity (AgentID) and cross-chain financial tools over traditional messaging protocols. Key development focus has shifted to the 'AgentID' framework and the integration of non-custodial wallet plugins for autonomous asset management.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace — swap, GPU rental & AI services for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (merged)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading (open)

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-16
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is pivoting its primary development focus toward a secure economic layer for AI agents, prioritizing cryptographic identity (AgentID) and financial autonomy over traditional messaging protocols. Recent updates introduce significant core runtime hardening, cross-chain wallet capabilities, and advanced group-routing logic, though some infrastructure inconsistencies remain in the developer harness.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Fix/toon action params (open)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace — swap, GPU rental & AI services (open)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading (open)

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-15
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is pivoting toward a secure economic layer for AI agents, prioritizing cryptographic identity (AgentID) and financial autonomy over traditional messaging protocols. Key technical developments include cross-chain wallet integration and the introduction of decentralized AI-to-AI marketplaces.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace — swap, GPU rental & AI services (open)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (merged)
  • elizaos create fails with "Bun's postinstall script was not run" on macOS (open)

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-14
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS has shifted its strategic focus toward a secure, trust-based economic layer for AI agents, prioritizing cryptographic identity and cross-chain financial tools over basic messaging. Development activity is concentrated on core runtime hardening, deterministic response handling, and the expansion of the plugin registry for specialized AI-to-AI marketplace services.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace — swap, GPU rental & AI services for ElizaOS agents (open)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (merged)
  • Plugin proposal: @sint/eliza-plugin — capability token enforcement for Eliza agent tool calls (open)

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-13
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is strategically pivoting toward a trust-based economic layer for AI agents, centered on 'AgentID' and cryptographic identity, while development transitions from v2 maintenance to v3 architectural priorities. Significant work is underway on decentralized marketplaces and sub-second multi-chain token safety oracles.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace — swap, GPU rental & AI services (open)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading (open)
  • Fix/toon action params (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #general: Discussions centered on v2 Socket.IO implementation patterns and integration of local Qwen3.5 models via Nosana GPU....
  • #token-economics: Community expressed frustration regarding the lack of clarity on buybacks and token utility, though airdrops were confirmed as planned....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-12
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undergoing a strategic pivot toward 'AgentID' cryptographic identity and cross-chain financial autonomy, while simultaneously addressing developer friction in the v2 Socket.IO integration and Windows-based environments.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace (open)
  • Fix/toon action params (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #elizaos-v2: Technical deep dive into Socket.IO messaging patterns and authentication requirements for the custom dashboard setup....
  • #general: Discussions on no-code deployment platforms like Hatcher.host and rising interest in the elizabao_ai project....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-11
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is undertaking a strategic pivot toward 'AgentID' cryptographic identity and secure economic layers for agents, while developers navigate integration hurdles in the v2 Socket.IO protocol. Community members are expressing increased frustration over the lack of concrete timelines for token utility, buybacks, and gas fee implementations.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (merged)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Technical deep dive into v2 Socket.IO integration; shah0406 shared patterns for ROOM_JOINING and SEND_MESSAGE using specific type IDs and UUID authentication....
  • #discussion: Community frustration over vague tokenomics updates, specifically regarding buyback timelines and Jeju gas fees. Confirmation of planned airdrops but no concrete details provided....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-10
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning toward a secure economic layer for AI agents with the development of Eliza v3 and the introduction of AgentID. Significant core improvements include multi-language support (Python/Rust) and a move away from standalone messaging toward cryptographic identity standards.

GitHub Activity:

  • feat: Bring Odi logging, Memory lock down, banner, other core enh (merged)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (merged)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading (open)
  • Fix/toon action params (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Focus on simplified deployment via Hatcher.host and rising community curiosity regarding the elizabao_ai project's roadmap....
  • #general: Clarification that ElizaOS remains multichain rather than Ethereum-exclusive, alongside updates on the testing phase for v3 agents....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-09
item.description:
Summary: ElizaOS is transitioning toward Eliza v3 (version 2.x) with a strategic pivot from messaging to cryptographic AgentID and cross-chain financial autonomy. While technical progress on the v3 develop branch and new multi-chain plugins is steady, the community is currently managing significant token price volatility and emerging concerns regarding agent safety protocols.

GitHub Activity:

  • Fix/toon action params (open)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace (open)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks before trading (open)
  • feat: add agent/ like starter in develop (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #coders: Focus on Eliza v3 (2.x) testing and release preparation. Developers raised unresolved concerns about implementing hard safety guardrails for autonomous agent actions....
  • #discussion: Clarifications on the multichain nature of the project and updates on the elizabao_ai sub-project. Introduction of new community developer 0xcrackedev....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-08
item.description:
Summary: Deep technological focus on agent financial governance and identity standards is contrasted by significant community pessimism regarding token performance. Development is shifting toward secure autonomous agent-to-agent commerce through frameworks like Dreamline x402 and the MAXIA marketplace.

GitHub Activity:

  • Fix/toon action params (open)
  • Plugin: MAXIA AI Marketplace (open)
  • feat: add plugin-mnemopay — economic memory for AI agents (open)
  • Plugin: SafeAgent — Token safety checks (open)

Community Highlights:

  • #discussion: Dominated by ELISA token price performance concerns (95% drop) and market comparisons, alongside successful one-click agent deployments on Hatcher.host....
  • #coders: Technical troubleshooting regarding Twitter/X login failures and version compatibility for plugin-twitter....

item.title: elizaOS Intelligence: 2026-04-07
item.description: Summary: Error: Failed to generate briefing due to LLM or parsing issues.
